Home / Lore / People / Joe Ferro

person

Joe Ferro

The original leader of the Cleaners, who made fire the faction's method for eliminating Green Poison.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Cleaner doctrine

Ferro establishes the Cleaners' defining belief that infection can be eradicated through fire. His death forces the faction to regroup before its return under Vivian Conley. [1]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    The official faction recap identifies Joe Ferro as the original leader of the Cleaners. [1]

  2. confirmed

    Ferro adopted fire as the drastic method for eliminating Green Poison, and the Division later killed him. [1]

Sources

  1. [1] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: Meet the Factions of Warlords of New York — Ubisoft News (2020-02-19). Accessed 2026-07-19.
